nodes.title: Validate lines.xml TextLine rules
nodes.description: Parse lines.xml with stdlib; enforce TextLine-related rules and optional require_text_line. Input: path from Glyph Machina or skip_gm. Success: ok with stats. Failure: error messages prefixed with error:.

nodes.title: Optional PAGE XSD validation
nodes.description: When xsd_path is set, validate lines.xml with lxml against XSD. Success: no errors. Failure: XSD error strings; skipped if xml-xsd extra not installed per implementation.
